insight: The /healthz route returned { mattermost_reachable, ai_gateway_reachable, mailbox_count } but spec required an `ok` boolean field; one-line omission in the c.json() call.

extractTodosFromText() declared as Promise<ExtractedTodo[]> (never null) but DO caller guards `extracted === null` for quota-exceeded audit events — that branch is permanently dead; 429 quota events are silently dropped.

After upgrading a route from Phase-N seam to real implementation, the surrounding block-comment above unrelated routes was left describing the old seam behavior — misleads future readers even though runtime is correct.

Phase 28 MCP infra is code-complete but real-founder E2E pilot was deferred to v1.5 (STARTUP-PILOT-LIVE-01) by explicit user decision — PILOT-EVIDENCE.md captures acceptance criteria and two closure paths. Not a code gap; requires a live founder run.
Daily.co Prebuilt is a plain iframe embed; all theming is dashboard-only (console.daily.co); no code path can set theme programmatically -- always human-verify post-dashboard-config.
